title: Terms and Conditions
description: Terms and conditions for using Melsta Studio's services
intro: Welcome to Melsta Studio ("Melsta Studio", "we", "our", or "us"). Melsta Studio is a technology-enabled beauty services platform that allows customers to discover, book, and engage verified beauty professionals for makeup and beauty services. These Terms and Conditions govern your access to and use of our website, mobile applications, and related services. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.description: By using our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.

items.title: Agreement
items.description: You must be at least 18 years old to use our services or have parental consent.

items.title: Updates
items.description: We may update these terms from time to time, and continued use constitutes acceptance.

items.title: Notification
items.description: We will notify you of significant changes via email or through our services.

sections.title: Service Description
sections.description: Melsta Studio provides a platform for booking professional beauty services and managing beauty service appointments.

items.title: Beauty Service Bookings
items.description: Customers can discover, request, and book makeup artists and beauty professionals for occasions including weddings, professional shoots, media productions, events, and other beauty requirements.

items.title: Verified Artist Network
items.description: Artists available through Melsta Studio undergo onboarding, identity verification, profile review, and quality assessment before activation on the platform.

items.title: Booking Management & Support
items.description: Melsta Studio facilitates booking management, customer support, payment collection, dispute handling, cancellations, and service coordination between customers and artists.

items.title: Booking Confirmation
items.description: A booking request becomes confirmed only after artist acceptance, successful payment processing where applicable, and confirmation through the Melsta Studio platform.

sections.title: User Accounts
sections.description: To access bookings, artist discovery, support services, and other platform features, you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for:

items.title: Account Security
items.description: Maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials.

items.title: Accurate Information
items.description: Providing accurate and complete information when creating your account.

items.title: Account Activity
items.description: All activities that occur under your account are your responsibility.

sections.title: Prohibited Activities
sections.description: You agree not to use our services for any unlawful or prohibited purpose, including:

items.title: Illegal Activities
items.description: Any activities that violate applicable laws or regulations.

items.title: Harmful Content
items.description: Posting content that is harmful, offensive, or violates others' rights.

items.title: Spam and Abuse
items.description: Sending spam, unsolicited messages, or engaging in harassment.

items.title: Security Violations
items.description: Attempting to gain unauthorized access to our systems or other users' accounts.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.description: All content on our platform is protected by intellectual property laws.

items.title: Our Rights
items.description: We retain all rights to our platform, content, and intellectual property.

items.title: Limited License
items.description: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive license to use our services for personal use.

items.title: User Content
items.description: You retain rights to content you create, but grant us license to use it on our platform.

sections.title: Artist Standards and Verification
sections.description: Melsta Studio maintains quality standards for artists operating through the platform.

items.title: Artist Verification
items.description: Artists are required to complete onboarding and verification requirements before being activated on the platform.

items.title: Quality Standards
items.description: Melsta Studio monitors artist performance, customer feedback, and service quality to maintain platform standards.

items.title: Platform Compliance
items.description: Melsta Studio reserves the right to suspend, restrict, or remove artists who fail to comply with platform policies or quality requirements.

sections.title: Payment Terms
sections.description: The following terms apply to bookings and payments processed through Melsta Studio.

items.title: Payment Methods
items.description: Payments may be made using supported payment methods displayed during checkout, including cards, UPI, net banking, wallets, and other supported payment options.

items.title: Pricing
items.description: All prices are displayed in Indian Rupees (INR) unless otherwise specified. Pricing may vary based on service requirements, location, timing, and artist selection.

items.title: Booking Payments
items.description: Payments for bookings are collected by Melsta Studio through authorized payment partners. Melsta Studio manages booking-related payment processing, refunds, cancellations, and settlement workflows in accordance with applicable policies.

sections.title: Privacy and Data
sections.description: Your privacy is important to us. Our data practices are governed by our Privacy Policy.
sections.content: By using our services, you consent to the collection, use, and sharing of your information as described in our Privacy Policy. We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal data.

highlight.title: Data Protection
highlight.description: We implement reasonable administrative, technical, and organizational safeguards to protect personal information. Customers may review our Privacy Policy to understand how personal data is collected, used, and protected.

sections.title: Disclaimers and Limitations
sections.description: Important limitations on our liability and service availability:

items.title: Service Availability
items.description: We provide services "as is" and cannot guarantee uninterrupted availability.

items.title: Medical Disclaimer
items.description: Beauty services provided through Melsta Studio are cosmetic in nature and are not intended to replace professional medical advice. Customers with allergies, sensitivities, or medical concerns should consult appropriate healthcare professionals before receiving services.

items.title: Liability Limitation
items.description: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Melsta Studio's liability arising from a booking or service shall not exceed the amount paid by the customer for the affected booking.

sections.title: Termination
sections.description: We may terminate or suspend your account and access to our services at any time, with or without cause.
sections.content: You may also terminate your account at any time by contacting us or using the account deletion feature. Upon termination, your right to use our services ceases immediately, and we may delete your account and data in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

items.title: Termination for Breach
items.description: We may terminate immediately if you violate these terms or engage in prohibited activities.

items.title: Data Retention
items.description: Some data may be retained for legal or business purposes as outlined in our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.description: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India.
sections.content: Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Bengaluru, Karnataka, unless otherwise required by applicable law.

highlight.title: Dispute Resolution
highlight.description: We encourage customers to contact Melsta Studio support first to resolve concerns relating to bookings, payments, cancellations, refunds, or services before initiating formal legal proceedings.

sections.title: Contact Information
sections.description: If you have any questions regarding these Terms, bookings, payments, refunds, or platform usage, please contact us.

footer: By using Melsta Studio's services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms and Conditions. Melsta Studio acts as a customer-facing platform for beauty service bookings and support. Thank you for choosing Melsta Studio.
